things.name: Lopé National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage forest-savanna mosaic with 400 gorillas and forest elephants

things.name: National Museum of Arts and Traditions
things.description: Extraordinary Fang bieri reliquary sculptures and Mitsogo initiation objects

things.name: Pointe Denis Beach
things.description: 15-minute speedboat to a pristine Atlantic beach opposite Libreville

things.name: Marche du Mont-Bouet
things.description: Gabon's largest traditional market with exotic fruits, forest products and crafts

things.name: Pongara National Park
things.description: Leatherback sea turtles nesting on the beach and forest elephants at night

things.name: St Michael's Cathedral
things.description: 1953 neo-Byzantine cathedral with stained glass and a mosaic of Christ by local artists

things.name: Ivindo National Park
things.description: Langoue Bai clearing where 100+ forest elephants gather - David Attenborough filmed here

things.name: Mbigou Stone Sculpture
things.description: Workshop of Gabon's unique soft stone sculptures depicting forest life

things.name: Jungle Lodge Bwindi-style Stay
things.description: Night in a forest lodge listening to lowland gorillas and forest elephants

things.name: Ntole (Salted Catfish with Plantain)
things.description: Gabon's popular combination - smoked catfish stew with green plantain
